articles.title: An LNG glut is on its way
articles.description: The closure of the Strait of Hormuz and the shutdown of Qatars LNG exports have pushed gas prices higher, but the disruption could ultimately lead to a prolonged global LNG glut, according to the analysis. The crisis has exposed the risks of relying on LNG supplies passing through Hormuz, prompting major Asian importers such as India, Bangladesh and Pakistan to seek alternative sources.
